description: During a live broadcast, a producer wants to show an instant replay of a key play from multiple angles.

nodes.task_description: Identify the key play and log the time.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the timestamp of the play.

nodes.task_description: Cue up the replay from multiple camera angles in the replay system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the different angles ready to play.

nodes.task_description: Play the replays on air as directed by the producer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully airs the multi-angle replay.
